siteVisits.title: Ahli Stadium Visit
siteVisits.alt: Students wearing safety vests during a stadium site visit
siteVisits.caption: Students observe construction coordination, safety practices, and project delivery in a real site environment.

siteVisits.title: Arkan 205 Site Visit
siteVisits.alt: Civil engineering students at an active construction project
siteVisits.caption: A field visit focused on construction sequencing, site organization, and structural work in progress.

siteVisits.title: Cairo Metro Visit
siteVisits.alt: Civil engineering students observing Cairo Metro construction works
siteVisits.caption: Students connect transportation infrastructure concepts with large-scale site execution.

siteVisits.title: Construction Site Visit
siteVisits.alt: Student group standing at a construction site
siteVisits.caption: General construction site exposure for understanding field workflow, logistics, and professional roles.

siteVisits.title: Dar Al-Handasah Visit
siteVisits.alt: Civil engineering students visiting a professional engineering consultancy
siteVisits.caption: A consultancy-oriented visit introducing design coordination, engineering documentation, and professional practice.

activitiesEvents.title: Earthquake Competition Event
activitiesEvents.alt: Students and faculty during an earthquake engineering competition activity
activitiesEvents.caption: A student competition focused on structural response, teamwork, and engineering explanation.

activitiesEvents.title: Spaghetti Competition Celebration
activitiesEvents.alt: Student team presenting a lightweight structural model
activitiesEvents.caption: A hands-on model-building activity that encourages structural thinking and iterative design.

activitiesEvents.title: Civil Engineering Day
activitiesEvents.alt: Civil Engineering Day session with students and faculty
activitiesEvents.caption: A department event for sharing civil engineering knowledge, experiences, and student engagement.

activitiesEvents.title: Graduation Project Defense
activitiesEvents.alt: Student presenting a civil engineering graduation project
activitiesEvents.caption: A capstone presentation setting where students communicate design decisions and applied project outcomes.

activitiesEvents.title: STEM & High School Hands-on Activities
activitiesEvents.alt: Students participating in a hands-on civil engineering workshop
activitiesEvents.caption: Workshop-style activities that introduce engineering measurement, observation, and experimentation.

activitiesEvents.title: CCE Bazaar
activitiesEvents.alt: Civil engineering model displays at a CCE activity

cceLabs.title: Structural Testing Area
cceLabs.alt: Structural testing frame from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
cceLabs.description: A structural testing area for observing load response and frame behavior.
cceLabs.practicalRelevance: Supports understanding of how structural elements behave under controlled loading.
cceLabs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 1, embedded image 2

cceLabs.title: Lab Instruction Room
cceLabs.alt: Instruction room shown in the Civil Lab Complex PDF
cceLabs.description: A teaching room connected to lab briefings, demonstrations, and technical instruction.
cceLabs.practicalRelevance: Prepares students to connect lab procedures with engineering interpretation.
cceLabs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 2, embedded image 1

cceLabs.title: Surveying Laboratory
cceLabs.alt: Surveying equipment in the Civil Lab Complex PDF
cceLabs.description: A surveying lab supporting measurement, field instruments, and spatial data collection.
cceLabs.practicalRelevance: Surveying is essential for setting out, mapping, and site-control work in civil projects.
cceLabs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 3, embedded image 1

cceLabs.title: Concrete & Materials Laboratory
cceLabs.alt: Concrete and materials laboratory shown in the Civil Lab Complex PDF
cceLabs.description: A materials lab for civil engineering material testing and quality-related demonstrations.
cceLabs.practicalRelevance: Materials testing supports safe construction, specification compliance, and durability decisions.
cceLabs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 4, embedded image 1

cceLabs.title: Soil Mechanics Laboratory
cceLabs.alt: Soil mechanics laboratory equipment from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
cceLabs.description: A geotechnical lab for soil behavior, testing setups, and foundation-related learning.
cceLabs.practicalRelevance: Soil mechanics supports foundation design, excavation work, and ground-condition evaluation.
cceLabs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 5, embedded image 1

cceLabs.title: Meteorology Laboratory
cceLabs.alt: Meteorology laboratory from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
cceLabs.description: A lab space for environmental and meteorological observation connected to infrastructure performance.
cceLabs.practicalRelevance: Weather and environmental conditions influence drainage, construction operations, and asset durability.
cceLabs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 6, embedded image 1

cceLabs.title: Hydraulics Laboratory
cceLabs.alt: Hydraulics laboratory equipment from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
cceLabs.description: A hydraulics lab for water-flow demonstrations and fluid mechanics learning.
cceLabs.practicalRelevance: Hydraulics supports drainage, water systems, channels, and infrastructure service design.
cceLabs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 7, embedded image 1

cceLabs.title: Transportation & Asphalt Laboratory
cceLabs.alt: Transportation and asphalt laboratory from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
cceLabs.description: A transportation and asphalt lab for pavement material and infrastructure testing concepts.
cceLabs.practicalRelevance: Supports highway, pavement, and transport-infrastructure engineering practice.
cceLabs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 8, embedded image 1

cceLabs.title: Environmental Laboratory
cceLabs.alt: Environmental laboratory from the Civil Lab Complex PDF
cceLabs.description: An environmental lab for observing water/environmental testing setups relevant to civil infrastructure.
cceLabs.practicalRelevance: Environmental testing supports water quality, sustainability, and responsible infrastructure delivery.
cceLabs.source: Civil Lab Complex.pdf, page 9, embedded image 1

ignored: Repeated Image9.png logo/header objects inside Civil Lab Complex.pdf were ignored as non-lab photography.
Videos in CCE Activities & Events/Videos were not used because the requested deliverable is a static image-led microsite.
Unselected duplicate event and site-visit photos were ignored to avoid repetition and keep each section focused.
